project_summary.estimator_summary: Secure analysis extracted 38 opening(s) and 0 hardware set(s). Verify against source PDF before bidding.

door_analysis.door_material: SOLID CORE WOOD FLUSH WITH PLASTIC LAMINATE

door_analysis.room_or_location: REFRESH (HOT & COLD PLUNGE) / MENS LOCKER ROOM
REFRESH (HOT & COLD PLUNGE) / WOMENS LOCKER ROOM

remarks: CLOPAY ARCHITECTURAL SERIES-ALUMINUM - 904U W/ 1" INSULATED GLAZING

general_notes: DOOR TYPE 1 SOLID CORE WOOD WITH HOLLOW METAL FRAME
DOOR TYPE 2 ALUMINUM WITH ALUMINUM FRAME AND 14" TEMPERED CLEAR GLAZING, EXCEPT SAUNA DOORS WHICH ARE 1" INSULATED TEMPERED CLEAR GLAZING
DOOR TYPE 3 INSULATED HOLLOW METAL WITH HOLLOW METAL FRAME
DOOR TYPE 4 SOLID CORE WOOD WITH HOLLOW METAL FRAME WITH LOUVER VENT
DOOR TYPE 5 SOLID CORE WOOD WITH PL-1 PLASTIC LAMINATE FRONT, BACK, AND TOP, WITH HOLLOW METAL FRAME AT JAMBS ONLY
DOOR TYPE 6 PAINTED STEEL GATE (P-3 SEMI-GLOSS) WITH BLACK PVC-COATED WWF AND STEEL FRAME
1 ) ALL EXTERIOR DOORS SHALL BE WEATHER STRIPPED
2 ) ALL BUILDING ENTRANCES SHALL BE ACCESSIBLE IN ACCORDANCE WITH ICC/A117.1
3 ) ALL DOORS SHALL BE PROVIDED WITH A LEVEL FLOOR OR LANDING - ALL THRESHOLDS PROVIDED SHALL HAVE A MAXIMUM OF 1/2" ABOVE THE FLOOR PER CODE
4 ) HOLLOW METAL DOOR FRAMES SHALL HAVE MITERED CORNERS, WELDED AND GROUND SMOOTH
5 ) OPENING SIZE IS EQUAL TO NET OPENING - ROUGH OPENING IS PER MANUFACTURE

7 ) HARDWARE: ALL HARDWARE SHALL COMPLY WITH ICC/A117.1 AND SHALL BE MADE OF THE SAME MATERIAL AND HAVE THE SAME FINISH AS SELECTED BY THE ARCHITECT. REFER TO SPECIFICATIONS FOR HARDWARE DESCRIPTIONS, REQUIREMENTS FOR DESIGN, FUNCTION SIZE, OPERATION, MOUNTING LOCATIONS AND OTHER REQUIREMENTS
8 ) THE LOWER 12" OF ALL DOORS SHALL COMPLY WITH CODE AND SHALL BE SMOOTH AND UNINTERRUPTED, TO ALLOW THE DOOR TO BE OPENED BY A WHEELCHAIR FOOT REST, WITHOUT CREATING A TRAP OR HAZARDOUS CONDITION.
9 ) THE MAXIMUM EFFORT TO OPERATE DOORS, APPLIED AT RIGHT ANGLES TO HINGED DOORS SHALL COMPLY WITH THE CURRENT CODE REQUIREMENTS.

10 ) RATED DOORS SHALL BE LABELED SHOWING THE NAME OF THE MANUFACTURER, THE NAME OF THE THIRD PARTY INSPECTION AGENCY, THE FIRE PROTECTION RATING AND, WHERE REQUIRED FOR FIRE DOORS IN EXIT ENCLOSURES, \ THE MAXIMUM TRANSMITTED TEMPERATURE END POINT. SMOKE AND DRAFT CONTROL DOORS COMPLYING WITH UL 1784 AND SHALL BE LABELED AS A SMOKE AND DRAFT CONTROL DOOR. LABELS SHALL BE APPROVED AND PERMANENTLY AFFIXED. THE LABEL SHALL BE APPLIED AT THE FACTORY WHERE FABRICATIONS AND ASSEMBLY ARE PERFORMED.

11 ) THE DETAILS AS INDICATED ON DRAWINGS REFLECT DESIGN INTENT ONLY. ATTACHMENTS AND SEALANT DETAILS ARE SCHEMATIC, AND TOGETHER WITH SPECIFICATIONS AND PROFILES SHOWN ARE INTENDED TO ESTABLISH THE PERFORMANCE REQUIREMENTS AND MATERIAL QUALITIES REQUIRED. DETAILS NOT SHOWN SHALL BE SIMILAR IN CHARACTER TO THOSE DETAILS. WHERE SPECIFIC DIMENSIONS, DETAILS OR INTENT CANNOT BE DETEREMINED, OR ARE NOT CLEARLY DEFINED, THE ARCHITECTS CLARIFICATIONS SHALL BE REQUESTED BEFORE PROCEEDING WITH THAT PORTION OF THE WORK. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL DEVELOP FINAL DETAILS TO ACCOMMODATE THE FABRICATION (SHOP DRAWINGS), ERECTION AND INSTALLATION OF THE WORK IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE DESIGN INTENT SHOWN.

12 ) ALUMINUM SURFACES IN CONTACT WITH DISSIMILAR METALS OR WITH INCOMPATIBLE MATERIALS SHALL BE PAINTED ON CONTACT WITH A PROTECTIVE COATING OF ALKALI-RESISTANT BITUMINOUS PAINT BEFORE INSTALLATION OR ISOLATED IN AN APPROVED MANNER WITH NON-ABSORPTIVE TAPE OR GASKETS

13 ) DOORS TO THE PLUNGE POOL ROOM ARE TO BE OPERABLE FROM INSIDE THE LOCKER ROOM ONLY BY CARD READER PANEL; CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE ELECTRIFIED DOOR HARDWARE AND PROVIDE ALL WIRING IN CONDUIT HIDDEN IN WALLS OR DOOR FRAMES
14 ) ALL EXITS SHALL BE OPENABLE FROM THE INSIDE WITHOUT THE USE OF A KEY OR SPECIAL KNOWLEDGE
15 ) MANUAL OPERATED EDGE OR SURFACE MOUNTED FLUSH BOLTS AND SURFACE BOLTS ARE PROHIBITED
16 ) PROVIDE 3-TIER KEYING SYSTEM

17 ) INTERIOR DOOR HARDWARE FINISH SHALL BE SATIN CHROME - US26D; IN GROUND-UP PROJECTS, EXTERIOR DOOR HARDWARE SHALL BE AS INDICATED IN THE CONSTRUCTION DOCUMENTS. IN 2ND GENERATION PROJECTS, EXTERIOR DOOR HARDWARE SHALL MATCH EXISTING EXTERIOR DOOR HARDWARE
18 ) CYLINDERS: ALL CYLINDERS SHALL BE BEST HEAVY DUTY WITH CLASSIC KEYWAY
19 ) ALL DOOR HARDWARE SHALL BE ACCESSIBLE

20 ) SAUNAS: COORDINATE INSTALLATION OF DOOR WITH SAUNA MANUFACTURER TO ENSURE COMPLETE SEAL - DOOR AND GLAZING IS REQUIRED TO WITHSTAND TEMPERATURES AND MOISTURE OF SAUNA PER MANUFACTURERS RECOMMENDATIONS - PROVIDE WOOD HANDLES INSIDE AND OUT
21 ) ALL WOOD DOORS WITH HOLLOW METAL FRAMES SHALL BE PAINTED TO MATCH ADJACENT SURFACE AND SHALL BE PAINTED SEMI-GLOSS SHEEN
22 ) INTERIOR STOREFRONT METAL FINISH SHALL BE CLEAR ANODIZED ALUMINUM UNLESS NOTED OTHERWISE

23 ) ALL INTERIOR DOORS (EXCEPT FIRE DOORS) FORCE FOR PUSHING OR PULLING SHALL NOT EXCEED 5 POUNDS - ALL OTHER SWINGING, SLIDING AND FOLDING DOORS; LATCHES SHALL RELEASE WHEN SUBJECTED TO A 15-POUND FORCE, SHALL BE SET IN MOTION WHEN SUBJECTED TO A 30-POUND FORCE AND SWING TO A FULL-OPEN POSITION WHEN SUBJECTED TO A 15-POUND FORCE AS REQUIRED BY IBC SECTION 1010.1.3

24 ) DOOR HANDLES, PULLS, LATCHES, LOCKS AND OTHER OPERATION DEVICES ON DOORS REQUIRED TO BE ACCESSIBLE BY ICC/A117.1 SHALL NOT REQUIRE TIGHT GRASPING, TIGHT PINCHING OR TWISTING OF THE WRIST TO OPERATE AS REQURIED BY IBC SECTION 1010.1.9.1 - SUCH HARDWARE SHALL BE 34" MINIMUM AND 48" MAXIMUM ABOVE FINISH FLOOR OR GROUND AS REQUIRED BY ICC/A11.7.1 EXCEPT AS OTHERWISE NOTED

25 ) PROVIDE PERMANENT SIGNAGE IDENTIFYING REQUIREMENT FOR EXIT DOORS TO REMAIN UNLOCKED WHILE OCCUPIED AS REQUIRED BY IBC AND IFC SECTION 1010.9.4.2.2 PROVIDE CODE-REQUIRED SIGNAGE WITH VISUAL AND TACTILE CONTENT AT ALL DOORS WHERE REQUIRED BY CODE
1. EXTERIOR STOREFRONT FRAMING SYSTEM SHALL BE CENTER-GLAZED, MEDIUM STILE, WITH ANODIZED ALUMINUM FINISH: BRONZE ANODIZED ALUMINUM
2. EXTERIOR STOREFRONT GLAZING SHALL BE 1" INSULATED WITH COLOR: INSULATED CLEAR
3. EXTERIOR STOREFRONT GLAZING SOLAR HEAT GAIN COEFFICIENT (SHGC): .22 OR LOWER
4. INTERIOR STOREFRONT FRAMING SYSTEM SHALL BE CENTER-GLAZED, MEDIUM STILE, CLEAR ANODIZED ALUMINUM FINISH
5. INTERIOR STOREFRONT GLAZING SHALL BE 14" CLEAR, EXCEPT INTERIOR STOREFRONT GLAZING AT SAUNAS SHALL BE 1" INSULATED CLEAR
6. PROVIDE TEMPERED GLAZING AS REQUIRED BY CODE

project_risks.issue: 38 opening(s) have no hardware set assigned in the schedule.
project_risks.recommendation: Issue RFI to confirm hardware set assignments before bidding.

project_risks.issue: 2 fire-rated opening(s) require coordinated UL-listed door, frame and hardware assemblies.
project_risks.recommendation: Confirm labels, positive latching, closers and gasketing requirements.

rfi_log.question: The door schedule does not show a hardware set for: 100A, 100B, 101B, 102, 104, 105, 110A, 110B, ...+30 more. Please confirm the intended hardware set for each.

estimator_notes: Keying notes captured from the drawings (2 line(s)); verify keyway, master structure, cylinder format and key counts.
38 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
36 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
15 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
allowances_to_consider: Allowance for fire-rated assembly coordination, S-label gasketing and any UL field-modification charges.
coordination_items: Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
